de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class BinaryTacletAppFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.BinaryFeature
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.BinaryTacletAppFeature
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractNonDuplicateAppFeature, AutomatedRuleFeature, CheckApplyEqFeature, DiffFindAndIfFeature, DiffFindAndReplacewithFeature, ExistentiallyConnectedFormulasFeature, FindPrefixRestrictionFeature, InEquationMultFeature, InstantiatedSVFeature, IntroducedSymbolBy, MatchedIfFeature, NoSelfApplicationFeature, OnlyInScopeOfQuantifiersFeature, PolynomialValuesCmpFeature, ReducibleMonomialsFeature, SmallerThanFeature, TacletRequiringInstantiationFeature, TopLevelFindFeature, TriggerVarInstantiatedFeature, TrivialMonomialLCRFeature

    public abstract class BinaryTacletAppFeature
extends BinaryFeature
    Abstract superclass for features of TacletApps that have either zero or top cost.

    • Method Detail

      • filter

        protected final boolean filter(RuleApp app,
                               PosInOccurrence pos,
                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from class: BinaryFeature
        Compute whether the result of the feature is zero (true) or infinity (false)
        Specified by:
        filter in class BinaryFeature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        true iff the the result of the feature is supposed to be zero.

      • filter

        protected abstract boolean filter(TacletApp app,
                                  PosInOccurrence pos,
                                  Goal goal)
        Compute whether the result of the feature is zero (true) or infinity (false)
        Parameters:
        app - the TacletApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        true iff the the result of the feature is supposed to be zero.
